title: cephalanthera royleana
intro: Cephalanthera royleana, also known as the Himalayan summer green orchid or the white flowered orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cephalanthera royleana include its potential to help manage fever, reduce pain, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
